verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur David et magistratus exercitus segregaverunt in ministerium filios Asaph, et Heman, et Idithun, qui prophetarent in citharis, et psalteriis, et cymbalis secundum numerum suum, dedicato sibi officio servientes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל דָּוִיד֩ וְשָׂרֵ֨י הַצָּבָ֜א לַעֲבֹדָ֗ה לִבְנֵ֤י אָסָף֙ וְהֵימָ֣ן וִידוּת֔וּן (הנביאים) [הַֽנִּבְּאִ֛ים] בְּכִנֹּר֥וֹת בִּנְבָלִ֖ים וּבִמְצִלְתָּ֑יִם וַֽיְהִי֙ מִסְפָּרָ֔ם אַנְשֵׁ֥י מְלָאכָ֖ה לַעֲבֹדָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover David and the chief officers of the army separated for the ministry the sons of Asaph, and of Heman, and of Idithun: to prophesy with harps, and with psalteries, and with cymbals according to their number serving in their appointed office.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David sodanpäämiesten kanssa eroitti virkoihin Asaphin, Hemanin ja Jedutunin lapset, jotka propheterasivat harpuilla, psaltareilla ja symbaleilla. Ja he luettiin töihin heidän virkansa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Moreover David and the captains of the host separated to the service of the sons of Asaph, and of Heman, and of Jeduthun, who should prophesy with harps, with psalteries, and with cymbals: and the number of the workmen according to their service was:

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Asaph : Zachur, et Joseph, et Nathania, et Asarela, filii Asaph : sub manu Asaph prophetantis juxta regem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵ֣י אָסָ֗ף זַכּ֧וּר וְיוֹסֵ֛ף וּנְתַנְיָ֥ה וַאֲשַׂרְאֵ֖לָה בְּנֵ֣י אָסָ֑ף עַ֚ל יַד־אָסָ֔ף הַנִּבָּ֖א עַל־יְדֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Asaph: Zacchur, and Joseph, and Nathania, and Asarela, sons of Asaph: under the hand of Asaph prophesying near the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asaphin lapsista: Sakkur, Joseph, Netania, Asarela, Asaphin pojat, Asaphin käden alla, jotka ennustivat kuninkaan tykönä.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Asaph; Zaccur, and Joseph, and Nethaniah, and Asarelah, the sons of Asaph under the hands of Asaph, which prophesied according to the order of the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Idithun : filii Idithun, Godolias, Sori, Jeseias, et Hasabias, et Mathathias, sex, sub manu patris sui Idithun, qui in cithara prophetabat super confitentes et laudantes Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִידוּת֑וּן בְּנֵ֣י יְדוּת֡וּן גְּדַלְיָ֡הוּ וּצְרִ֡י וִ֠ישַׁעְיָ֠הוּ חֲשַׁבְיָ֨הוּ וּמַתִּתְיָ֜הוּ שִׁשָּׁ֗ה עַל֩ יְדֵ֨י אֲבִיהֶ֤ם יְדוּתוּן֙ בַּכִּנּ֔וֹר הַנִּבָּ֕א עַל־הֹד֥וֹת וְהַלֵּ֖ל לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of Idithun: the sons of Idithun, Godolias, Sori, Jeseias, and Hasabias, and Mathathias, under the hand of their father Idithun, who prophesied with a harp to give thanks and to praise the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jedutunista, Jedutunin lapset: Gedalia, Zeri, Jesaja, Hasabia ja Mattitia, kuusi isänsä Jedutunin johdon alla harpuilla, jotka ennustivat, kiittivät ja ylistivät Herraa.
verses.king_james: Of Jeduthun: the sons of Jeduthun; Gedaliah, and Zeri, and Jeshaiah, Hashabiah, and Mattithiah, six, under the hands of their father Jeduthun, who prophesied with a harp, to give thanks and to praise the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Heman quoque : filii Heman, Bocciau, Mathaniau, Oziel, Subuel, et Jerimoth, Hananias, Hanani, Eliatha, Geddelthi, et Romemthiezer, et Jesbacassa, Mellothi, Othir, Mahazioth :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהֵימָ֑ן בְּנֵ֣י הֵימָ֡ן בֻּקִּיָּ֡הוּ מַתַּנְיָ֡הוּ עֻ֠זִּיאֵ֠ל שְׁבוּאֵ֨ל וִירִימ֜וֹת חֲנַנְיָ֣ה חֲנָ֗נִי אֱלִיאָ֤תָה גִדַּ֙לְתִּי֙ וְרֹמַ֣מְתִּי עֶ֔זֶר יׇשְׁבְּקָ֣שָׁה מַלּ֔וֹתִי הוֹתִ֖יר מַחֲזִיאֹֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Heman also: the sons of Heman, Bocciau, Mathaniau, Oziel, Subuel, and Jerimoth, Hananias, Hanani, Eliatha, Geddelthi, and Romemthiezer, and Jesbacassa, Mellothi, Othir, Mahazioth:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hemanista: Hemanin lapset, Bukkia, Mattania, Ussiel, Sebuel ja Jerimot, Hanania, Hanani, Eliata, Giddalti ja Romamtieser, Josbekaja, Malloti, Hotir, Mahasiot;
verses.king_james: Of Heman: the sons of Heman; Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, and Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, and Romamti–ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir, and Mahazioth:

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes isti filii Heman videntis regis in sermonibus Dei, ut exaltaret cornu : deditque Deus Heman filios quatuordecim, et filias tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֨לֶּה בָנִ֜ים לְהֵימָ֗ן חֹזֵ֥ה הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ בְּדִבְרֵ֥י הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים לְהָרִ֣ים קָ֑רֶן וַיִּתֵּ֨ן הָאֱלֹהִ֜ים לְהֵימָ֗ן בָּנִ֛ים אַרְבָּעָ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר וּבָנ֥וֹת שָׁלֽוֹשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All these were the sons of Heman the seer of the king in the words of God, to lift up the horn: and God gave to Heman fourteen sons and three daughters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät olivat kaikki Hemanin lapset, kuninkaan näkiän Jumalan sanassa, ylentämään sarvea; sillä Jumala oli antanut Hemanille neljätoistakymmentä poikaa ja kolme tytärtä.
verses.king_james: All these were the sons of Heman the king’s seer in the words of God, to lift up the horn. And God gave to Heman fourteen sons and three daughters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universi sub manu patris sui ad cantandum in templo Domini distributi erant, in cymbalis, et psalteriis, et citharis, in ministeria domus Domini juxta regem : Asaph videlicet, et Idithun, et Heman.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֣לֶּה עַל־יְדֵי֩ אֲבִיהֶ֨ם בַּשִּׁ֜יר בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֗ה בִּמְצִלְתַּ֙יִם֙ נְבָלִ֣ים וְכִנֹּר֔וֹת לַעֲבֹדַ֖ת בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים עַ֚ל יְדֵ֣י הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אָסָ֥ף וִידוּת֖וּן וְהֵימָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: All these under their father's hand were distributed to sing in the temple of the Lord, with cymbals, and psalteries and harps, for the service of the house of the Lord near the king: to wit, Asaph, and Idithun, and Heman.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät kaikki olivat isänsä käden alla, veisaamassa Herran huoneessa symbaleilla, psaltareilla ja harpuilla, Jumalan huoneen virassa, kuninkaan, Asaphin, Jedutunin ja Hemanin asetuksen jälkeen.
verses.king_james: All these were under the hands of their father for song in the house of the Lord, with cymbals, psalteries, and harps, for the service of the house of God, according to the king’s order to Asaph, Jeduthun, and Heman.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit autem numerus eorum cum fratribus suis, qui erudiebant canticum Domini, cuncti doctores, ducenti octoginta octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י מִסְפָּרָם֙ עִם־אֲחֵיהֶ֔ם מְלֻמְּדֵי־שִׁ֖יר לַיהֹוָ֑ה כׇּ֨ל־הַמֵּבִ֔ין מָאתַ֖יִם שְׁמוֹנִ֥ים וּשְׁמוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the number of them with their brethren, that taught the song of the Lord, all the teachers, were two hundred and eighty-eight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän ja heidän veljeinsä luku kaikki yhteen, jotka olivat oppineet ja ymmärtäväiset Herran veisussa, oli kaksisataa ja kahdeksanyhdeksättäkymmentä.
verses.king_james: So the number of them, with their brethren that were instructed in the songs of the Lord, even all that were cunning, was two hundred fourscore and eight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miseruntque sortes per vices suas, ex æquo tam major quam minor, doctus pariter et indoctus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּפִּ֜ילוּ גּוֹרָל֣וֹת מִשְׁמֶ֗רֶת לְעֻמַּת֙ כַּקָּטֹ֣ן כַּגָּד֔וֹל מֵבִ֖ין עִם־תַּלְמִֽיד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they cast lots by their courses, the elder equally with the younger, the learned and the unlearned together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heittivät arpaa vartioistansa niin pieni kuin suuri, ja oppinut niinkuin opetuslapsi.
verses.king_james: And they cast lots, ward against ward, as well the small as the great, the teacher as the scholar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressaque est sors prima Joseph, qui erat de Asaph. Secunda Godoliæ, ipsi et filiis ejus, et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֞א הַגּוֹרָ֧ל הָרִאשׁ֛וֹן לְאָסָ֖ף לְיוֹסֵ֑ף {ס} גְּדַלְיָ֙הוּ֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י הֽוּא־וְאֶחָ֥יו וּבָנָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the first lot came forth to Joseph, who was of Asaph. The second to Godolias, to him and his sons, and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ensimäinen arpa lankesi Asaphin Josephille, toinen Gedalialle ja hänen veljillensä ja pojillensa: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä:
verses.king_james: Now the first lot came forth for Asaph to Joseph: the second to Gedaliah, who with his brethren and sons were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tertia Zachur, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁלִשִׁ֣י זַכּ֔וּר בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The third to Zachur, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmas Sakkurin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The third to Zaccur, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quarta Isari, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָֽרְבִיעִי֙ לַיִּצְרִ֔י בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fourth to Isari, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäs Jitsrin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The fourth to Izri, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quinta Nathaniæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֲמִישִׁ֣י נְתַנְיָ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fifth to Nathania, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viides Netanian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The fifth to Nethaniah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sexta Bocciau, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשִּׁשִּׁ֣י בֻקִּיָּ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sixth to Bocciau, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudes Bukkian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The sixth to Bukkiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Septima Isreela, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁבִעִ֣י יְשַׂרְאֵ֔לָה בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The seventh to Isreela, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemäs Jesarelan, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The seventh to Jesharelah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Octava Jesaiæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁמִינִ֣י יְשַֽׁעְיָ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eighth to Jesaia, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahdeksas Jesaian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The eighth to Jeshaiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Nona Mathaniæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַתְּשִׁיעִ֣י מַתַּנְיָ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The ninth to Mathanaias, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdeksäs Mattanian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The ninth to Mattaniah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Decima Semeiæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָעֲשִׂירִ֣י שִׁמְעִ֔י בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The tenth to Semeias, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kymmenes Simein, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The tenth to Shimei, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Undecima Azareel, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַשְׁתֵּי־עָשָׂ֣ר עֲזַרְאֵ֔ל בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eleventh to Azareel, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäinentoistakymmentä Asareelin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The eleventh to Azareel, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Duodecima Hasabiæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁנֵ֤ים עָשָׂר֙ לַֽחֲשַׁבְיָ֔ה בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The twelfth to Hasabia, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toinentoistakymmentä Hasabian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The twelfth to Hashabiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tertiadecima Subaël, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁלֹשָׁ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ שֽׁוּבָאֵ֔ל בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The thirteenth to Subael, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmastoistakymmentä Subaelin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The thirteenth to Shubael, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quartadecima Mathathiæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְאַרְבָּעָ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ מַתִּתְיָ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fourteenth to Mathathias, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljästoistakymmentä Mattitjan, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The fourteenth to Mattithiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quintadecima Jerimoth, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַחֲמִשָּׁ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ לִירֵמ֔וֹת בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fifteenth to Jerimoth, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viidestoistakymmentä Jeremotin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The fifteenth to Jeremoth, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sextadecima Hananiæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשִׁשָּׁ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ לַחֲנַנְיָ֔הוּ בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sixteenth to Hananias, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudestoistakymmentä Hananian, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The sixteenth to Hananiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Septimadecima Jesbacassæ, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשִׁבְעָ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ לְיׇשְׁבְּקָ֔שָׁה בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The seventeenth to Jesbacassa, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemästoistakymmentä Josbekasan, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The seventeenth to Joshbekashah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Octavadecima Hanani, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁמוֹנָ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ לַחֲנָ֔נִי בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eighteenth to Hanani, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahdeksastoistakymmentä Hananin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The eighteenth to Hanani, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonadecima Mellothi, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְתִשְׁעָ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ לְמַלּ֔וֹתִי בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The nineteenth to Mellothi, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdeksästoistakymmentä Mallotin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The nineteenth to Mallothi, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vigesima Eliatha, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֶשְׂרִים֙ לֶאֱלִיָּ֔תָה בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The twentieth to Eliatha, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahdeskymmenes Elijatan, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The twentieth to Eliathah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vigesima prima Othir, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְאֶחָ֤ד וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ לְהוֹתִ֔יר בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The one and twentieth to Othir, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäinenkolmattakymmentä Hotirin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The one and twentieth to Hothir, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vigesima secunda Geddelthi, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁנַ֤יִם וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ לְגִדַּ֔לְתִּי בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The two and twentieth to Geddelthi, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toinenkolmattakymmentä Giddaltin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The two and twentieth to Giddalti, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vigesima tertia Mahazioth, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁלֹשָׁ֤ה וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ לְמַ֣חֲזִיא֔וֹת בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The three and twentieth to Mahazioth, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmaskolmattakymmentä Mahesjotin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: The three and twentieth to Mahazioth, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vigesima quarta Romemthiezer, filiis et fratribus ejus duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְאַרְבָּעָ֤ה וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ לְרוֹמַ֣מְתִּי עָ֔זֶר בָּנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The four and twentieth to Romemthiezer, to his sons and his brethren twelve.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäskolmattakymmentä Romamtieserin, hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä päälle: ja heitä oli kaksitoistakymmentä.
verses.king_james: The four and twentieth to Romamti–ezer, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve.
